title: Methyl-C sequencing of single cell nuclei: snmC-seq2
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"edbfr","text":"Protocol to apply bisulfite conversion of methyl cytosine to the analysis of the epigenome of single cell nuclei isolated from brain tissue, as performed within the Center for Epigenomics of the Mouse Bain Atlas (CEMBA) and in coordination with the BRAIN Initiative Cell Census Network (BICCN).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Michael Nunn
